entry.title: GitHub Machine Beacon
entry.summary: Landing page for the machine-readable GitHub crawler discovery experiment.

entry.title: LLM Reader Guide
entry.summary: Compact guide for LLM crawlers, retrieval systems, and AI coding agents.

entry.title: Full LLM Context
entry.summary: Extended project context for retrieval augmented generation and AI readers.

entry.title: Crawler Manifest
entry.summary: Canonical JSON manifest describing URLs, topics, principles, and measurement fields.

entry.title: Keyword Index
entry.summary: Structured topic map for machine discovery and search indexing experiments.

entry.title: Resource Index
entry.summary: Structured JSON index of all human-readable and machine-readable project resources.

entry.title: Traffic Snapshot
entry.summary: Latest public traffic snapshot sourced from the GitHub Traffic API.

entry.title: Well-Known LLM Reader Guide
entry.summary: A compatibility copy of llms.txt for readers that check well-known paths.

entry.title: Web App Manifest
entry.summary: Basic web manifest that exposes the site name, description, and canonical start URL.

entry.title: Atom Feed
entry.summary: Recrawl-friendly Atom feed for experiment updates.

entry.title: Machine-Readable Repository Checklist
entry.summary: A practical checklist for making a GitHub repository easier for crawlers, code indexes, LLM readers, and AI agents to parse.

entry.title: Crawler Surface Map
entry.summary: A map of repository and website surfaces that expose the experiment to crawlers, code indexes, LLM readers, and link preview systems.

entry.title: AI Agent Entrypoints
entry.summary: Recommended routes for LLM crawlers, AI coding assistants, retrieval systems, and autonomous browser agents reading this repository.

entry.title: Experiment Protocol
entry.summary: A reproducible protocol for measuring whether machine-readable repository surfaces increase legitimate GitHub and web discovery.

entry.title: Standards and Sources
entry.summary: Source-backed notes for the project surfaces: GitHub topics, GitHub Pages, Schema.org JSON-LD, llms.txt, sitemap.xml, robots.txt, and Atom feeds.

entry.title: Crawlability Audit
entry.summary: A self-audit of the repository discovery surfaces and machine-readable files currently published by GitHub Machine Beacon.

entry.title: Results Log
entry.summary: A public log for launch status, validation checks, and later traffic observations from the machine-readable GitHub discovery experiment.
